payload.message:
Facebook Marketplace Monitor - Check for messages

The cron job has triggered. Run the Facebook Marketplace monitor script and report any actionable buyer interest.

Execute: node dinner-automation/scripts/facebook-marketplace-automation.js --monitor

This checks Facebook Marketplace messages for keywords related to F-150 and Thule box. Keywords: f-150, f150, truck, thule, box, cargo, rack, buy, interested, available, price, offer.

Report summary of any new actionable messages found. If buyers are interested, alert Alexander to check his Facebook inbox.
